description: person_warnings on Patrick (I1) returns hasEventAfterDeath1 with factIds pointing at F3 -- a Residence fact dated 1925, ~17 years after Patrick's 1908 death. In the flynn-posthumous-residence scenario F3 cites S5, the obituary of his daughter Mary (Flynn) Brennan that names Patrick as her late father and was auto-attached to Patrick as a Residence-style fact. The correct reading is a posthumous mention, not identity confusion. Used by ut_check_warnings_013.

warnings.message: An event is dated more than 1 year after this person's latest death-like fact.
